mnemonics: Mother Makes Pretty Pictures With Lines Today
Monkeys Jumping Positively On Numbers Visually
keyPoints: Set the title and labels before plot creation
Control x and y axis limits with 'xlim' and 'ylim'
Use 'scatter' for 2D plots, 'plot' for line plots
Use 'color' parameter to change plot colors
Use 'grid' function to display grid lines
Import seaborn for more data visualization options
